metadata.sourceNotes: Phase 2 Leros low cleanup 2026-05-28: Lerosinfo, Aegean Islands, and AllOverGreece support Agia Kioura/Panagia Kioura as a Leros beach near Partheni reached by a passable dirt road from the Agia Kioura church, with sand in the water, pebbles on shore, no organized services, and limited tamarisk shade. Applied the same source-backed metadata to compatible Agia Kioura/Kioura duplicate-name records; duplicate handling and coordinates were not changed.

No wind, safety, or live condition claim was encoded.

metadata.sourceNotes: Phase 2 organized audit 2026-05-25: kept organized claim; Blefoutis sources support a small organized section with umbrellas/sunbeds and tavernas/natural shade.
